summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TripSync Phase 5 features: Dashboard redesign with stat cards and welcome header, preferences form with departure/return city and time preference selectors, updated matching engine with time_fit scores, and verified existing features (Templates, AI Chatbot, Deal Finder) still work correctly.
passed_tests: Dashboard stat cards (Create New Trip, Active Trips: 5, Completed: 0, Total Participants: 5)
Dashboard Templates + New Trip buttons present
Trip cards show status badges ('Collecting Preferences')
Trip cards show participant avatars and trip type
Preferences form Step 1 shows departure city input
Return to same city toggle works (shows/hides return city input)
Departure time preference card selector with 5 options (Very Early, Morning, Afternoon, Evening, Flexible)
Return time preference card selector with 5 options
Backend recommendations show 5 score columns (Budget, Dates, Access, Match, Time)
Trip Templates page loads with 8+ templates
Backend API tests: 22/23 passed (95.7% success rate)
